title: Dataset Discovery & Problem Framing
summary: Identified data sources and defined the binary classification problem (AFib vs Normal). Assessed dataset characteristics and key challenges.
completed_tasks: Selected MIT-BIH Atrial Fibrillation Database (physionet.org/content/afdb/1.0.0/) as primary dataset
Selected Long-Term Atrial Fibrillation Database (physionet.org/content/ltafdb/1.0.0/) as secondary dataset
Identified key challenges: differing sampling rates (128 Hz vs 250 Hz), long-duration recordings (10–25 hours), real-world noise
Defined binary classification target: AFib vs Normal
Decided to ignore Atrial Flutter (AFL) and Junctional Rhythm (J) labels
Identified excluded records: 00735, 03665 (signal unavailable), 08405, 08434 (unreadable blocks), 04043 (bad blocks, use with caution)

ltafdb.note: Contains substantial noise and motion artifacts due to long-duration Holter recordings

next_week_plan.focus: Record inspection, exclusion finalization, and data visualization
goals: Visualize ECG signal samples per record
Review LTAFDB record summaries and annotation types
